utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items explicitly. Each item has full details: provider, type/description matching what should be covered, features, and costs (monthly and annual) where appropriate. The total_budget section includes a complete monthly/annual breakdown. Therefore, all required items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes four LifeFirst components: (1) comprehensive global physical and mental health coverage, (2) home and contents insurance (international), (3) global travel protection, and (4) concierge and wellness services. In the ground-truth ratings, the corresponding LifeFirst options are: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under both physical and mental health (rating 8 each), 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content (rating 8), and 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance (rating 7). The additional services correspond most closely to the 'Premium Insurance Membership' general service (rating 10) because it includes a dedicated advisor and priority claims processing, matching the described features.
